creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

To submitter:  FreeBSD is available on DVD from several online 
retailers, see http://www.freebsd.org/where.html and the links from 
there for details. 
About the installer, a new installer is under development, but is not 
yet mature enough to be incorporated into FreeBSD.  Many people also 
prefer the text based installer, as it is easier to use on headless 
servers, servers without mice, etc.
